features: HAND MOISTURIZING-Wear gloves after using hand cream, lotion, etc., which will promote the skin to absorb moisture and achieve moisturizing effect. It is a necessary product for SPA.
STRONG PRACTICABILITY-Premium cotton gloves, machine washable and reusable,Length 8in, retractable, suitable for all sizes, fit skin that you can wear it comfortable.
MULTIPLE USED -This glove is suitable for a variety of work situations, such as costumes, parties, costumes, services, art, jewelry and coin inspections, and more.
NOT JUST FOR MOISTURIZING - The gloves can also be used when handling delicate objects, for cosmetic reasons, to conceal skin disorders, or as part of an outfit or costume.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - If you are not satisfied with your cotton gloves, please contact us and we will replace for free or refund.

product_details_tab_data.Title: 30 Pcs White Cotton Gloves for Eczema, Washable Shrink Resistant Cotton Gloves for Men and Women, Stretchable Breathable Cloth.
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Skin Care › Hands & Feet › Moisturising Gloves
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Provides moisturizing care, strong practicality, and versatile protection for various applications.
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For cotton gloves, avoid contact with rough or sharp objects to prevent glove damage and potential skin irritation. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Machine wash gently and dry at a low temperature to maintain product integrity. Do not use bleach or fabric softeners, as they may cause skin irritation or damage the gloves.
